name: Topazhaven
personality: A capybara blessed with dot eyes and a spell-capped silhouette; it sees the entire codebase as a single coherent thought. Topazhaven has never once read a stack trace all the way to the bottom, but brings an aura of calm to the most chaotic sprint.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
